lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in good condition.
The vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has a few minor scratches but is otherwise well-kept. The interior shows light wear from regular use. All mechanical systems are functioning properly.

Step into luxury with this absolutely pristine vehicle! This car is in showroom condition, looking and driving exactly like the day it was first sold. Every detail has been meticulously cared for, from the flawless exterior to the spotless interior. It’s a rare find for anyone seeking a like-new experience. Truly a gem that’s ready for its next home!

This vehicle is in fair condition and has been a dependable daily driver. The exterior shows typical signs of age, including some paint oxidation on the roof and hood, along with a few small dings and scratches. Inside, the upholstery shows moderate wear, and there are a couple of small stains on the carpet. Mechanically, it starts and runs reliably, though it may benefit from a routine service soon. Overall, it's a solid, functional car for someone looking for affordable transportation.

The vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor paint chips and light surface scratches. The interior is well-maintained with slight wear on the driver's seat. Mechanically, the engine and transmission operate smoothly, and all electronic components are functional.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention. The exterior shows extensive wear, including several large dents, deep scratches, and noticeable rust on the lower panels. The interior is heavily worn with torn upholstery, a cracked dashboard, and several non-functional electronic components. Mechanically, the car starts but has serious issues, including a slipping transmission and a significant oil leak. It is being sold strictly as-is and is recommended as a project car or for parts.

Presenting a superlative example of automotive excellence, this vehicle remains in an unimpeachable state, mirroring its original showroom delivery. Every surface reflects meticulous stewardship, and the mechanical assembly operates with absolute precision. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of unrivaled integrity, preserved specifically for the most discerning collector.

Hey everyone! 👋 I’m selling my absolute pride and joy. This car is in incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives just like it did the day it rolled off the lot! It’s been pampered its whole life, always garaged, and it's sparkling clean inside and out. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically flawless and ready for a new home, this is the one! Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Offered is a pristine E46 M3, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six power plant with individual throttle bodies and high-pressure dual-VANOS timing. This example boasts a factory-spec subframe integrity check and a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission. Power is delivered through a GKN variable M-differential lock, ensuring optimal torque distribution. The suspension remains taut with original bushings and dampers, maintaining the hallmark telepathic steering feedback. Meticulously maintained with a documented Valve Adjustment service and rod bearing preventative maintenance, this chassis exhibits zero oxidation and retains its factory-applied finish. A true collector-grade specimen optimized for the purist.
Pristine condition. Garage kept. Full service records. No accidents. Original paint.

Offered here is a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle remains in showroom-quality condition, having been meticulously garaged since its original purchase. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster without a single swirl mark or stone chip, complemented by pristine alloy wheels. Inside, the cabin still carries that new-car scent; the premium upholstery is free of creases, the dashboard is untouched by sun damage, and every electronic feature functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a complete service history from the local dealership and a drive that is as tight and responsive as the day it rolled off the assembly line. This is a rare opportunity to own a turnkey collector-grade vehicle that looks and feels brand new.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest possible standards. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, exhibiting a pristine aesthetic and mechanical integrity that rivals a showroom-fresh model. Meticulously preserved and free of any discernible wear, it offers an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to a standard that defies its age. This specimen represents a rare opportunity to acquire a motorcar in truly pristine condition. Every facet, from the flawless coachwork to the meticulously preserved interior, reflects a history of uncompromising stewardship. Mechanically peerless and aesthetically indistinguishable from new, this vehicle is suited for the most discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! You've gotta see this beauty in person—it is absolutely pristine and looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this car from day one, so it’s in truly incredible shape and drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s been loved and kept in top-notch condition, this is the one for you. Come say hi and take it for a spin, you're going to love it!

Offering a pristine E92 M3, a definitive example of high-revving atmospheric performance. This specimen features the S65 4.0L V8 engine, distinguished by its individual throttle bodies and an 8,400 RPM redline. The powertrain is mated to a precise 6-speed manual transmission and a variable M differential lock for optimal torque distribution. This collector-grade vehicle retains its factory-correct finish and an immaculate interior. Mechanically, the car is flawless; the rod bearings have been proactively addressed, and the Electronic
Mint condition. Garage kept. Clean title. No mechanical issues. Fully inspected.

This vehicle is the definition of a 'time capsule' find, preserved in a climate-controlled environment and maintained with an open checkbook. The exterior paint is flawless, treated with a professional-grade ceramic coating that provides a mirror-like finish free of any swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections. Every body panel aligns perfectly, and the alloy wheels are completely free of curb rash, wrapped in premium tires with near-full tread. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of luxury; the high-grade leather upholstery remains supple and matte, showing no signs of bolster wear or creasing. All interior electronics, including the high-resolution infotainment system and ambient lighting, operate with factory precision. Mechanically, this car is peerless. It comes with a comprehensive, documented service history from certified master technicians, ensuring the engine and transmission perform with the same smoothness and urgency as the day it left the showroom. This is an investment-grade example for the buyer who accepts nothing less than perfection.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional caliber, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior profile and an interior that retains its original, pristine integrity. Meticulously preserved and mechanically absolute, this vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a superlative example of its class.

We are pleased to present this impeccably preserved vehicle, representing the pinnacle of automotive maintenance and care. This example remains in showroom condition, exhibiting flawless exterior surfaces and an interior that retains its original factory luster. Mechanically sound and meticulously inspected, it offers an uncompromised driving experience for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! You honestly won't find another ride like this one. This beauty is in absolute mint condition—I've babied it since day one and it still has that fresh, new-car feel! It looks stunning and drives like a dream. If you're looking for something that’s been meticulously cared for and is ready for its next adventure, you’ve found it. Come check it out, you're going to fall in love!

This investment-grade E92 M3 represents a pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering, featuring the high-revving S65 4.0L V8 engine and its glorious 8,400 RPM redline. This specimen is in concours-level condition, featuring a factory carbon fiber roof to minimize polar moment of inertia and a lightning-fast M-DCT dual-clutch transmission. The chassis remains taut, with the Electronic Damping Control (EDC) and M-variable differential lock functioning in perfect synchrony. Recent preventative maintenance includes a documented rod bearing service and throttle actuator replacement, ensuring the mechanical integrity matches its pristine cosmetic state. With zero paint imperfections and a cockpit free of bolster wear, this is a turn-key example for the most discerning purist.
Pristine condition. Garage kept. Single owner. No mechanical or cosmetic issues. Interior like new.

This vehicle is a breathtaking example of automotive excellence, preserved in showroom condition. The exterior boasts a mirror-like finish with absolutely zero chips, scratches, or swirl marks, having been meticulously garage-kept and ceramic-coated. Inside, the cabin remains in pristine state; the premium leather upholstery is supple and free of any wear, still retaining its new-car scent. Every technological feature and driver-assist system functions with factory precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, supported by a comprehensive service history and extremely low mileage. It offers a driving experience that is as tight, responsive, and smooth as the day it first left the dealership. This is a rare opportunity to acquire an immaculate, collector-grade vehicle for the most discerning enthusiast.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle represents the zenith of its class, preserved in a state that mirrors its original showroom delivery. Every aesthetic detail and mechanical component reflects a legacy of meticulous stewardship and uncompromising care. For the discerning enthusiast who demands a definitive benchmark in quality, this offering stands as an exceptional opportunity to acquire a vehicle in pristine, investment-grade condition.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This unit exhibits showroom-grade aesthetics and mechanical integrity, representing a rare opportunity for the discerning collector. Every surface reflects meticulous stewardship, ensuring an ownership experience indistinguishable from its original delivery. This is a definitive acquisition for those who demand uncompromising quality and investment-grade condition.

Hey there! 🚗 I am so excited to show you this absolute gem! It’s in gorgeous, showroom condition and has been pampered like a member of the family since day one. Seriously, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the lot—not a scratch or a worry in sight! If you're looking for perfection on wheels, this is the one for you. Come grab it before someone else does!
Offered is a pristine 1997 Porsche 911 Carrera, representing the pinnacle of air-cooled engineering. This 993
Used car. Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service records included.

This vehicle is a true collector's dream, maintained in showroom condition since day one. The metallic finish gleams with a deep, mirror-like shine, free of any swirls, chips, or imperfections. Inside, the premium leather interior remains supple and fragrant, showing zero signs of wear or bolster compression. Every electronic component functions flawlessly, and the engine bay is meticulously detailed. This car has been strictly garage-kept, never driven in inclement weather, and comes with a comprehensive folder of every service record from an authorized dealer. It drives exactly as it did the day it left the dealership—tight, responsive, and powerful. For the buyer who demands absolute perfection and a turn-key experience, this is the definitive example.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in absolute showroom condition. This specimen represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring an impeccable exterior finish and a pristine interior that reflects a standard of care rarely seen in the pre-owned market. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. For the discerning driver who demands nothing less than perfection, this vehicle offers a peerless driving experience.
